metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4530
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig. 3B shows accumulation of immunoreactivity (immunoperoxidase product) in presynaptic boutons of axodendritic and axospinous synapses in the human cerebral cortex. Fig. 3C-F show examples of immunogold particles associated with vesicles along the presynaptic membrane lining the synaptic cleft. As neurotrypsin contains a signal peptide in is a secreted protein, it is assumed that it is localized within vesicles at the active zone. Caveat: it is unclear whether these are clear synaptic vesicles or dense-core vesicles or rather undefined vesicle-like organelles.
Affinity-purified antibodies raised against its proteolytic domain were used for specific neurotrypsin detection (as stated on p. 1780).. Experimental description: Fig. 3. Immunolocalization of neurotrypsin.
Neurotrypsin was visualized in adult human cerebral cortex... (p. 1781)
